task_objective: Address principal engineer review findings, fix dropdown styling for case-insensitive class matches, solve multi-window QAM styling bugs, memoize CSS elements, and handle unhandled settings queue rejections
design_decisions: Guarded settings cache updates with sequence numbers. Fixed indentation. Solved QAM styling issue where styles appended to document.head in the background context were not loaded in the QAM's separate window context by rendering <style>{dropdownStyleEl.textContent}</style> inside the Content JSX tree. Switched selectors to use case-insensitive matching [class*='...'] and targeted general focusable/button roles recursively. Memoized the styleElement using React.useMemo inside Content component to prevent layout thrashing and redundant style parsing. Added try-catch rejection handling inside processSettingsQueue and notify user via activeLudusaviStore.
results: All checks passed, build succeeded, tests pass cleanly, changes committed under fix/dropdown-width branch.
